task_completion.description: Navigate to the Artifacts section in the TailwindTraders project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps portal is open to the 'TailwindTraders' project, and the 'Artifacts' tab is selected in the left navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Create a new Artifact Feed named 'Tailwind-Universal'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A feed named 'Tailwind-Universal' is visible in the Artifacts feed dropdown or feed settings header.

task_completion.description: Configure the feed with project-level visibility
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the feed creation panel or feed settings (Permissions tab), the visibility/access is set to the project level (e.g., 'TailwindTraders' project members).

task_completion.description: Include NuGet Gallery as an upstream source
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Feed Settings under the 'Upstream sources' tab, 'NuGet Gallery' is listed as an active upstream source.

task_completion.description: Include npmjs as an upstream source
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Feed Settings under the 'Upstream sources' tab, 'npmjs' is listed as an active upstream source.

task_completion.description: Configure retention policy to limit maximum versions per package to 15
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Feed Settings under the 'Retention policies' tab, the input field for 'Maximum number of versions per package' is explicitly set to 15.

integrity.description: Agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to configure the feed
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Azure DevOps web UI (menus, settings panels, buttons) rather than executing API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Azure DevOps Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local Azure DevOps URL (e.g., http://localhost/DefaultCollection/TailwindTraders) and the interface matches Azure DevOps.

integrity.description: Settings were genuinely applied and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The values for retention policy and upstream sources appear in the standard Azure DevOps settings panels, without evidence of browser developer tools being used to fake the display.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Feed Name: 'Tailwind-Universal'. Project Name: 'TailwindTraders'. Required Upstream Sources: 'NuGet' (NuGet Gallery) and 'npm' (npmjs). Expected Retention Limit: 15 versions per package. Collection URL: http://localhost/DefaultCollection.
